channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-13 21:51 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI is rolling out Skills ongrok.com. This new feature lets you create custom skills that Grok can r...
item.description: xAI is rolling out Skills ongrok.com. This new feature lets you create custom skills that Grok can reuse across conversations. Skills run inside Grok’s sandbox environment, so they can edit files, use your Connectors (Gmail, GitHub, Notion, etc.), run code, or perform any repeatable task you define. Once you create one, you simply tell Grok “use the [skill name] skill and do…” and it executes it instantly. You can also import skills.md files from other AI tools to bring them over quickly. It turns Grok from a one-shot chat tool into a more persistent, customizable workspace. This is a huge upgrade for anyone who uses Grok regularly.

item.title: @elonmusk: I have friends who never touch the wheel anymore because of it
item.description: I have friends who never touch the wheel anymore because of it

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon: Nothing will make you happier, than having kids, and@ZubyMusicexplains how parenting needs to ...
item.description: Elon: Nothing will make you happier, than having kids, and@ZubyMusicexplains how parenting needs to be made cool again 💙

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: SpaceX has once again broken the record for the tallest rocket ever built. For the third t...
item.description: BREAKING: SpaceX has once again broken the record for the tallest rocket ever built. For the third time in just three years, a new version of Starship has been stacked at Starbase in South Texas near the US-Mexico border. Starship V3 is larger and more powerful than previous generations, continuing SpaceX’s rapid pace of iteration as it pushes toward full reusability and deep space missions. The scale of development happening at Starbase is unlike anything the modern space industry has seen.

item.title: @elonmusk: There was no award when Newton discovered three laws of forces, nor when da Vinci painted the Mona L...
item.description: There was no award when Newton discovered three laws of forces, nor when da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa. There was no Grammy for Beethoven or Chopin, nor a Nobel Prize in Literature for Homer. Masterpieces do not seek transient trophies but aim to be timeless.

item.title: @elonmusk: Finally we're going to get shots of Starship from a deployed payload:
item.description: Finally we're going to get shots of Starship from a deployed payload:

item.title: @elonmusk: SPACEX: Marmac 31 "You'll Thank Me Later" now has a cover installed. This barge will transport the S...
item.description: SPACEX: Marmac 31 "You'll Thank Me Later" now has a cover installed. This barge will transport the Super Heavy Boosters from Starbase to the Cape.

item.title: @elonmusk: I’m not mocking her masculinity. I’m denying its existence.
item.description: I’m not mocking her masculinity. I’m denying its existence.

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is officially my fav art account now
